# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- After every successful code change in SmackTown, increment the PWA service worker cache version (the CACHE constant in sw.js, e.g. 'smacktown-v2' -> 'smacktown-v3'), then commit all changes and push to the main branch.
- Always update the small version number displayed beside the home-page SmackTown title whenever the service-worker cache version changes in SmackTown.
